artifacts.proposal: Reframe the AI sidebar in PublishPage as a multi-turn chat co-pilot; ship the underlying primitive (Zustand chat store + form bridge + persistence interface + SSE multi-messages endpoint) and its 66-case unit suite. Wiring the existing AiSidebar.tsx onto the primitive, the backend SSE multi-messages entry-point, and the Dexie adapter are follow-up scope.
artifacts.design: UseChatStore + ChatStorage DI seam; streaming command trio (append / commit / cancel); form bridge via imperative ref with safe degradation (null ref → structured null result, throwing handle → caught). Two-phase pruner (TTL → quota, strict less-than at boundaries). Backend: backward-compatible `messages` array entry-point on existing /api/ai/generate/stream, no new endpoint or SSE protocol.
